race.description: Victor Harbor Motor Co Maiden Plate
race.comment: BROTHER LAWRIE (2) failed to fire a shot in his debut prep before spelling but looks to have come on a treat during the break, stripping fitter for three sharp jump-outs. Toeroek's booking adds plenty of confidence. Has the wide alley to overcome but is expected to play a major role. SILENT LEGACY (5) was doing her best work late when resuming three weeks ago at Balaklava. Is sure to have come on from that and is drawn favourably. Can give this a shake. GOODWIN GURU (11) is a Ghaiyyath filly out of Gossip Guru, who has produced her share of winners. Has jumped out well in readiness and should be focused with the blinkers on. Just needs a smart steer and a touch of luck from the car park draw. LUNAR VISTA (4) was a big improver second-up when sent forward and fighting on gamely into the placings. More to come. BJARNE (1) wasn't far away two back at Sale in testing conditions. Well bellow his best last time but willing to forgive. Keeping safe in first start for new stable.
